S.FORM: Mark Alarie sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, pzyang pkaki' tay kska', wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1963, ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 12, Mark Alarie, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: mark alarie s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, pzjaŇč pkaki Ē taj ks~…ēka Ē, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, mark alarie, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
